description_long: This is a medium-sized wooden desk with a rich, dark brown finish and a smooth, rectangular top surface. The front side features two drawers with silver handles on the left and an open shelf space on the right, providing both storage and organizational options. The right side of the desk includes a curved lower shelf, suitable for holding a computer tower or other items. The desk's construction appears sturdy, with thick panels and a solid base, and the wood grain is visible throughout, adding a touch of elegance. The back of the desk is mostly enclosed, with a central open section for legroom or cable management. The overall design is functional and modern, making it suitable for both professional and home office environments.
description: A dark brown wooden desk with drawers, open shelving, and a smooth rectangular top, featuring silver handles and a modern, sturdy design.
description_view_0: Front view showing two drawers with silver handles on the left, an open shelf on the right, and a spacious top surface.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a solid wood panel with no visible features or openings.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a mostly enclosed back with a central open section for legroom or cable management.
description_view_3: Right side view with a solid wood panel, mirroring the left side, and a slight curve on the front edge.
attribute_orientation: The side with drawers and open shelving is intended to face the user, serving as the functional front of the desk, while the solid panels form the sides and the mostly enclosed panel is the back.
